center.name: 奥克兰群岛
center.summary: 奥克兰群岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Double-banded plover、Antarctic prion、Yellow-crowned parakeet，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It breeds in colonies on the Auckland Islands, Heard Island, Macquarie Island, Scott Island, South Georgia and the South Sandwich Islands, the South Orkney Islands, South Shetland Islands, Crozet Islands, and the Kerguelen Islands. When not breeding, it ranges throughout the southern oceans.{{Cite journal |last1=Shepherd |first1=Lara D

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Two subspecies are recognised: the nominate Charadrius bicinctus bicinctus, which breeds throughout New Zealand, including the Chatham Islands, and Charadrius bicinctus exilis, which breeds in New Zealand's subantarctic Auckland Islands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The species is found across the main three islands of New Zealand, North Island, South Island and Stewart Island/Rakiura, as well as on the subantarctic Auckland Islands
